snapshot.description: Permanent snapshot of first real human pilot data. Raw, unmodified.

known_issues: P006 q12: residual characters from previous question ('杯子zai')
P003 q12: incomplete translation (missing path details)
P003 q16: metaphorical interpretation deviating from source
q14: 'brought forward' systematically misunderstood by 4/8 participants

governance.freeze_policy: This directory is READ-ONLY. No modifications after freeze date.
governance.gdpr: All participant IDs are pseudonyms (P001-P008). No PII stored.
governance.retention: Data retained 12 months post-project, then permanently deleted (GDPR Art. 17). Analysis results (aggregated, no PII) retained indefinitely.

ethics_review.status: H1 fixed, H2 verified, H3 accepted_as_is, H4 documented
ethics_review.placeholders_remaining: None — all resolved to anonymous contact model
